Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Account

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Account
public class Account extends Object
Account

An Account as represented in the account ecosystem.

    Class

    Account()
     
    Account(Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication, Optional<String> accountGroupId, Optional<String> accountId, Optional<String> accountNumber, Optional<? extends List<String>> activeRestrictions, Optional<Boolean> advised, Optional<? extends List<Agreement>> agreements, Optional<? extends AccountCatAccountHolderType> catAccountHolderType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CatReporterInformation> catReporterInformation, Optional<? extends CftcOwnerType> cftcOwnerType, Optional<String> clientAccountId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> closeTime, Optional<String> correspondentId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime, Optional<? extends Domicile> domicile, Optional<? extends List<Enrollment>> enrollments, Optional<String> fdid, Optional<? extends FinraCoaCode> finraCoaCode, Optional<? extends FundingType> fundingType, Optional<? extends List<Identifier>> identifiers, Optional<? extends List<InterestedParty>> interestedParties, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends InvestmentProfile> investmentProfile, Optional<Boolean> managed, Optional<String> marginGroupId, Optional<String> name, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> openTime, Optional<String> originatingAccountId, Optional<? extends OwnershipType> ownershipType, Optional<? extends List<Party>> parties, Optional<Boolean> patternDayTrader, Optional<String> primaryRegisteredRepId, Optional<? extends RegistrationType> registrationType, Optional<? extends ReserveClass> reserveClass, Optional<? extends AccountState> state, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AccountTaxProfile> taxProfile, Optional<String> title, Optional<? extends List<TrustedContact>> trustedContacts, Optional<Boolean> wrapFeeBilled)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Boolean>
    acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication()
    Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm.
    Optional<String>
    accountGroupId()
    An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)
    Optional<String>
    accountId()
    A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; This is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions
    Optional<String>
    accountNumber()
    A "unique" identifier referencing this single account This should be the human readable identifier for the account used for display
    Optional<List<String>>
    activeRestrictions()
    The list of restrictions currently impacting a given account; Restrictions suspend one or more entitlements dependent on their mapping
    Optional<Boolean>
    advised()
    A boolean to indicate if an account is advised.
    Optional<List<Agreement>>
    agreements()
    The collection of legal agreements belonging to a given account
    static Account.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<AccountCatAccountHolderType>
    catAccountHolderType()
    The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CatReporterInformation>
    catReporterInformation()
    The CAT reporter information for the account
    Optional<CftcOwnerType>
    cftcOwnerType()
    Indicates the CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) owner type of the account.
    Optional<String>
    clientAccountId()
    An external identifier for the account.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    closeTime()
    The time the account was closed; If the account is not closed, this is null
    Optional<String>
    correspondentId()
    A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    createTime()
    The time the initial account record was created; May differ from the `open_time` timestamp which depends on when all required data was provided to the system
    Optional<Domicile>
    domicile()
    Indicates if the account is `DOMESTIC` or `FOREIGN`
    Optional<List<Enrollment>>
    enrollments()
    A list of enrollments (or "features") on an account; May consist of both active an inactive enrollments
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    Optional<String>
    fdid()
    Apex requires a Firm-Designated ID (FDID) for Consolidated Audit Trail (CAT) reporting and uses it as a unique identifier for each trading account; The identifier cannot be the same as the accountID; Apex automatically assigns this ID.
    Optional<FinraCoaCode>
    finraCoaCode()
    The FINRA COA code associated with the account
    Optional<FundingType>
    fundingType()
    Describes if the account is cash-only or has access to a form of margin
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<List<Identifier>>
    identifiers()
    Deprecated.
    field: This will be removed in a future release, please migrate away from it as soon as possible.
    Optional<List<InterestedParty>>
    interestedParties()
    A list of natural persons indicated to receive selected account documents such as account statements
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<InvestmentProfile>
    investmentProfile()
    The account's goals and customer's financial profile; Used to assess customer fitness and is required by FINRA
    Optional<Boolean>
    managed()
    A boolean to indicate if an account is managed.
    Optional<String>
    marginGroupId()
    An identifier generated for all non-cash accounts; Uses a combination of account type and owner information to tie accounts together in order to perform margin calculations
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The name field Format: accounts/{account}
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    openTime()
    The time the account was activated; Differs from `create_time` which is when the initial account record was created
    Optional<String>
    originatingAccountId()
    The previous account ID associated with the account; Must be unique
    Optional<OwnershipType>
    ownershipType()
    A roll-up account classification based on the `registration_type`; Indicates what owns the account and/or if it is a special type (e.g., Joint, Estate, Retirement, etc.); Used primarily for reporting and high-level type identification
    Optional<List<Party>>
    parties()
    Parties associated with the account (e.g.
    Optional<Boolean>
    patternDayTrader()
    Indicates if the customer is a PDT; This is set if the account executes four or more day trades (buy and sell the same security intraday) within a period of five business days.
    Optional<String>
    primaryRegisteredRepId()
    The primary registered representative for the account
    Optional<RegistrationType>
    registrationType()
    The registration of the account (e.g.
    Optional<ReserveClass>
    reserveClass()
    The Reserve Class associated with the account
    Optional<AccountState>
    state()
    Indicates if the account is `OPEN`, `PENDING`, or `CLOSED`
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AccountTaxProfile>
    taxProfile()
    Tax-related attributes for the account; A tax profile with taxpayer attributes is located on the `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` objects elsewhere on the account record
    Optional<String>
    title()
    The title of the account.
    String
    toString()
     
    Optional<List<TrustedContact>>
    trustedContacts()
    A list of persons designated to verify the well being of the account holder.
    Account
    withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(boolean acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
    Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm.
    Account
    withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
    Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm.
    Account
    withAccountGroupId(String accountGroupId)
    An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)
    Account
    withAccountGroupId(Optional<String> accountGroupId)
    An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)
    Account

    A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; This is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • Account

      public Account(Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication, Optional<String> accountGroupId, Optional<String> accountId, Optional<String> accountNumber, Optional<? extends List<String>> activeRestrictions, Optional<Boolean> advised, Optional<? extends List<Agreement>> agreements, Optional<? extends AccountCatAccountHolderType> catAccountHolderType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CatReporterInformation> catReporterInformation, Optional<? extends CftcOwnerType> cftcOwnerType, Optional<String> clientAccountId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> closeTime, Optional<String> correspondentId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime, Optional<? extends Domicile> domicile, Optional<? extends List<Enrollment>> enrollments, Optional<String> fdid, Optional<? extends FinraCoaCode> finraCoaCode, Optional<? extends FundingType> fundingType, Optional<? extends List<Identifier>> identifiers, Optional<? extends List<InterestedParty>> interestedParties, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends InvestmentProfile> investmentProfile, Optional<Boolean> managed, Optional<String> marginGroupId, Optional<String> name, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> openTime, Optional<String> originatingAccountId, Optional<? extends OwnershipType> ownershipType, Optional<? extends List<Party>> parties, Optional<Boolean> patternDayTrader, Optional<String> primaryRegisteredRepId, Optional<? extends RegistrationType> registrationType, Optional<? extends ReserveClass> reserveClass, Optional<? extends AccountState> state, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AccountTaxProfile> taxProfile, Optional<String> title, Optional<? extends List<TrustedContact>> trustedContacts, Optional<Boolean> wrapFeeBilled)

    • Account

      public Account()

  • Method Details

    • acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication()
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • accountGroupId

      public Optional<String> accountGroupId()
      An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)

    • accountId

      public Optional<String> accountId()
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; This is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountNumber

      public Optional<String> accountNumber()
      A "unique" identifier referencing this single account This should be the human readable identifier for the account used for display

    • activeRestrictions

      public Optional<List<String>> activeRestrictions()
      The list of restrictions currently impacting a given account; Restrictions suspend one or more entitlements dependent on their mapping

    • advised

      public Optional<Boolean> advised()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is advised. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • agreements

      public Optional<List<Agreement>> agreements()
      The collection of legal agreements belonging to a given account

    • catAccountHolderType

      public Optional<AccountCatAccountHolderType> catAccountHolderType()
      The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type

    • catReporterInformation

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CatReporterInformation> catReporterInformation()
      The CAT reporter information for the account

    • cftcOwnerType

      public Optional<CftcOwnerType> cftcOwnerType()
      Indicates the CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) owner type of the account. This enum only applies to accounts regulated by the CFTC

    • clientAccountId

      public Optional<String> clientAccountId()
      An external identifier for the account. This identifier does not have internal uniqueness constraints.

    • closeTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> closeTime()
      The time the account was closed; If the account is not closed, this is null

    • correspondentId

      public Optional<String> correspondentId()
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • createTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime()
      The time the initial account record was created; May differ from the `open_time` timestamp which depends on when all required data was provided to the system

    • domicile

      public Optional<Domicile> domicile()
      Indicates if the account is `DOMESTIC` or `FOREIGN`

    • enrollments

      public Optional<List<Enrollment>> enrollments()
      A list of enrollments (or "features") on an account; May consist of both active an inactive enrollments

    • fdid

      public Optional<String> fdid()
      Apex requires a Firm-Designated ID (FDID) for Consolidated Audit Trail (CAT) reporting and uses it as a unique identifier for each trading account; The identifier cannot be the same as the accountID; Apex automatically assigns this ID.

    • finraCoaCode

      public Optional<FinraCoaCode> finraCoaCode()
      The FINRA COA code associated with the account

    • fundingType

      public Optional<FundingType> fundingType()
      Describes if the account is cash-only or has access to a form of margin

    • identifiers

      @Deprecated public Optional<List<Identifier>> identifiers()
      Deprecated.
      field: This will be removed in a future release, please migrate away from it as soon as possible.
      A list of identifiers associated with the account

    • interestedParties

      public Optional<List<InterestedParty>> interestedParties()
      A list of natural persons indicated to receive selected account documents such as account statements

    • investmentProfile

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<InvestmentProfile> investmentProfile()
      The account's goals and customer's financial profile; Used to assess customer fitness and is required by FINRA

    • managed

      public Optional<Boolean> managed()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is managed. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • marginGroupId

      public Optional<String> marginGroupId()
      An identifier generated for all non-cash accounts; Uses a combination of account type and owner information to tie accounts together in order to perform margin calculations

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: accounts/{account}

    • openTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> openTime()
      The time the account was activated; Differs from `create_time` which is when the initial account record was created

    • originatingAccountId

      public Optional<String> originatingAccountId()
      The previous account ID associated with the account; Must be unique

    • ownershipType

      public Optional<OwnershipType> ownershipType()
      A roll-up account classification based on the `registration_type`; Indicates what owns the account and/or if it is a special type (e.g., Joint, Estate, Retirement, etc.); Used primarily for reporting and high-level type identification

    • parties

      public Optional<List<Party>> parties()
      Parties associated with the account (e.g. custodian).

    • patternDayTrader

      public Optional<Boolean> patternDayTrader()
      Indicates if the customer is a PDT; This is set if the account executes four or more day trades (buy and sell the same security intraday) within a period of five business days. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • primaryRegisteredRepId

      public Optional<String> primaryRegisteredRepId()
      The primary registered representative for the account

    • registrationType

      public Optional<RegistrationType> registrationType()
      The registration of the account (e.g. Individual, Joint, IRA, etc.)

    • reserveClass

      public Optional<ReserveClass> reserveClass()
      The Reserve Class associated with the account

    • state

      public Optional<AccountState> state()
      Indicates if the account is `OPEN`, `PENDING`, or `CLOSED`

    • taxProfile

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AccountTaxProfile> taxProfile()
      Tax-related attributes for the account; A tax profile with taxpayer attributes is located on the `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` objects elsewhere on the account record

    • title

      public Optional<String> title()
      The title of the account.

    • trustedContacts

      public Optional<List<TrustedContact>> trustedContacts()
      A list of persons designated to verify the well being of the account holder.

    • wrapFeeBilled

      public Optional<Boolean> wrapFeeBilled()
      A boolean to indicate if an account is a wrap brokerage account. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • builder

      public static Account.Builder builder()

    • withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public Account withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(boolean acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication

      public Account withAcceptsIssuerDirectCommunication(Optional<Boolean> acceptsIssuerDirectCommunication)
      Indicates if the issuer of a security held by the account is permitted to communicate directly with the shareholder versus through the brokerage firm; This can include sending proxy statements, annual reports, and other important information directly to the shareholder's address on file with the brokerage firm. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withAccountGroupId

      public Account withAccountGroupId(String accountGroupId)
      An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)

    • withAccountGroupId

      public Account withAccountGroupId(Optional<String> accountGroupId)
      An Account Group is a way of segmenting accounts within a Correspondent; It is up to the client to define what these groups are and AFS Operations is responsible for configuring them; If the client requests additional groups/codes, they can be added; Examples of Account Groups could hypothetically include HNW (High Net Worth), GOLD (Gold Status Customer), and NWC (Northwest Branch Customer)

    • withAccountId

      public Account withAccountId(String accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; This is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • withAccountId

      public Account withAccountId(Optional<String> accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; This is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • withAccountNumber

      public Account withAccountNumber(String accountNumber)
      A "unique" identifier referencing this single account This should be the human readable identifier for the account used for display

    • withAccountNumber

      public Account withAccountNumber(Optional<String> accountNumber)
      A "unique" identifier referencing this single account This should be the human readable identifier for the account used for display

    • withActiveRestrictions

      public Account withActiveRestrictions(List<String> activeRestrictions)
      The list of restrictions currently impacting a given account; Restrictions suspend one or more entitlements dependent on their mapping

    • withActiveRestrictions

      public Account withActiveRestrictions(Optional<? extends List<String>> activeRestrictions)
      The list of restrictions currently impacting a given account; Restrictions suspend one or more entitlements dependent on their mapping

    • withAdvised

      public Account withAdvised(boolean advised)
      A boolean to indicate if an account is advised. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withAdvised

      public Account withAdvised(Optional<Boolean> advised)
      A boolean to indicate if an account is advised. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withAgreements

      public Account withAgreements(List<Agreement> agreements)
      The collection of legal agreements belonging to a given account

    • withAgreements

      public Account withAgreements(Optional<? extends List<Agreement>> agreements)
      The collection of legal agreements belonging to a given account

    • withCatAccountHolderType

      public Account withCatAccountHolderType(AccountCatAccountHolderType catAccountHolderType)
      The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type

    • withCatAccountHolderType

      public Account withCatAccountHolderType(Optional<? extends AccountCatAccountHolderType> catAccountHolderType)
      The FINRA CAT classification for the Account Holder; Is set automatically based on attributes of the owners and account type

    • withCatReporterInformation

      public Account withCatReporterInformation(CatReporterInformation catReporterInformation)
      The CAT reporter information for the account

    • withCatReporterInformation

      public Account withCatReporterInformation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CatReporterInformation> catReporterInformation)
      The CAT reporter information for the account

    • withCftcOwnerType

      public Account withCftcOwnerType(CftcOwnerType cftcOwnerType)
      Indicates the CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) owner type of the account. This enum only applies to accounts regulated by the CFTC

    • withCftcOwnerType

      public Account withCftcOwnerType(Optional<? extends CftcOwnerType> cftcOwnerType)
      Indicates the CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) owner type of the account. This enum only applies to accounts regulated by the CFTC

    • withClientAccountId

      public Account withClientAccountId(String clientAccountId)
      An external identifier for the account. This identifier does not have internal uniqueness constraints.

    • withClientAccountId

      public Account withClientAccountId(Optional<String> clientAccountId)
      An external identifier for the account. This identifier does not have internal uniqueness constraints.

    • withCloseTime

      public Account withCloseTime(OffsetDateTime closeTime)
      The time the account was closed; If the account is not closed, this is null

    • withCloseTime

      public Account withCloseTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> closeTime)
      The time the account was closed; If the account is not closed, this is null

    • withCorrespondentId

      public Account withCorrespondentId(String correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • withCorrespondentId

      public Account withCorrespondentId(Optional<String> correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • withCreateTime

      public Account withCreateTime(OffsetDateTime createTime)
      The time the initial account record was created; May differ from the `open_time` timestamp which depends on when all required data was provided to the system

    • withCreateTime

      public Account withCreateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime)
      The time the initial account record was created; May differ from the `open_time` timestamp which depends on when all required data was provided to the system

    • withDomicile

      public Account withDomicile(Domicile domicile)
      Indicates if the account is `DOMESTIC` or `FOREIGN`

    • withDomicile

      public Account withDomicile(Optional<? extends Domicile> domicile)
      Indicates if the account is `DOMESTIC` or `FOREIGN`

    • withEnrollments

      public Account withEnrollments(List<Enrollment> enrollments)
      A list of enrollments (or "features") on an account; May consist of both active an inactive enrollments

    • withEnrollments

      public Account withEnrollments(Optional<? extends List<Enrollment>> enrollments)
      A list of enrollments (or "features") on an account; May consist of both active an inactive enrollments

    • withFdid

      public Account withFdid(String fdid)
      Apex requires a Firm-Designated ID (FDID) for Consolidated Audit Trail (CAT) reporting and uses it as a unique identifier for each trading account; The identifier cannot be the same as the accountID; Apex automatically assigns this ID.

    • withFdid

      public Account withFdid(Optional<String> fdid)
      Apex requires a Firm-Designated ID (FDID) for Consolidated Audit Trail (CAT) reporting and uses it as a unique identifier for each trading account; The identifier cannot be the same as the accountID; Apex automatically assigns this ID.

    • withFinraCoaCode

      public Account withFinraCoaCode(FinraCoaCode finraCoaCode)
      The FINRA COA code associated with the account

    • withFinraCoaCode

      public Account withFinraCoaCode(Optional<? extends FinraCoaCode> finraCoaCode)
      The FINRA COA code associated with the account

    • withFundingType

      public Account withFundingType(FundingType fundingType)
      Describes if the account is cash-only or has access to a form of margin

    • withFundingType

      public Account withFundingType(Optional<? extends FundingType> fundingType)
      Describes if the account is cash-only or has access to a form of margin

    • withIdentifiers

      @Deprecated public Account withIdentifiers(List<Identifier> identifiers)
      Deprecated.
      field: This will be removed in a future release, please migrate away from it as soon as possible.
      A list of identifiers associated with the account

    • withIdentifiers

      @Deprecated public Account withIdentifiers(Optional<? extends List<Identifier>> identifiers)
      Deprecated.
      field: This will be removed in a future release, please migrate away from it as soon as possible.
      A list of identifiers associated with the account

    • withInterestedParties

      public Account withInterestedParties(List<InterestedParty> interestedParties)
      A list of natural persons indicated to receive selected account documents such as account statements

    • withInterestedParties

      public Account withInterestedParties(Optional<? extends List<InterestedParty>> interestedParties)
      A list of natural persons indicated to receive selected account documents such as account statements

    • withInvestmentProfile

      public Account withInvestmentProfile(InvestmentProfile investmentProfile)
      The account's goals and customer's financial profile; Used to assess customer fitness and is required by FINRA

    • withInvestmentProfile

      public Account withInvestmentProfile(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends InvestmentProfile> investmentProfile)
      The account's goals and customer's financial profile; Used to assess customer fitness and is required by FINRA

    • withManaged

      public Account withManaged(boolean managed)
      A boolean to indicate if an account is managed. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withManaged

      public Account withManaged(Optional<Boolean> managed)
      A boolean to indicate if an account is managed. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withMarginGroupId

      public Account withMarginGroupId(String marginGroupId)
      An identifier generated for all non-cash accounts; Uses a combination of account type and owner information to tie accounts together in order to perform margin calculations

    • withMarginGroupId

      public Account withMarginGroupId(Optional<String> marginGroupId)
      An identifier generated for all non-cash accounts; Uses a combination of account type and owner information to tie accounts together in order to perform margin calculations

    • withName

      public Account withName(String name)
      The name field Format: accounts/{account}

    • withName

      public Account withName(Optional<String> name)
      The name field Format: accounts/{account}

    • withOpenTime

      public Account withOpenTime(OffsetDateTime openTime)
      The time the account was activated; Differs from `create_time` which is when the initial account record was created

    • withOpenTime

      public Account withOpenTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> openTime)
      The time the account was activated; Differs from `create_time` which is when the initial account record was created

    • withOriginatingAccountId

      public Account withOriginatingAccountId(String originatingAccountId)
      The previous account ID associated with the account; Must be unique

    • withOriginatingAccountId

      public Account withOriginatingAccountId(Optional<String> originatingAccountId)
      The previous account ID associated with the account; Must be unique

    • withOwnershipType

      public Account withOwnershipType(OwnershipType ownershipType)
      A roll-up account classification based on the `registration_type`; Indicates what owns the account and/or if it is a special type (e.g., Joint, Estate, Retirement, etc.); Used primarily for reporting and high-level type identification

    • withOwnershipType

      public Account withOwnershipType(Optional<? extends OwnershipType> ownershipType)
      A roll-up account classification based on the `registration_type`; Indicates what owns the account and/or if it is a special type (e.g., Joint, Estate, Retirement, etc.); Used primarily for reporting and high-level type identification

    • withParties

      public Account withParties(List<Party> parties)
      Parties associated with the account (e.g. custodian).

    • withParties

      public Account withParties(Optional<? extends List<Party>> parties)
      Parties associated with the account (e.g. custodian).

    • withPatternDayTrader

      public Account withPatternDayTrader(boolean patternDayTrader)
      Indicates if the customer is a PDT; This is set if the account executes four or more day trades (buy and sell the same security intraday) within a period of five business days. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withPatternDayTrader

      public Account withPatternDayTrader(Optional<Boolean> patternDayTrader)
      Indicates if the customer is a PDT; This is set if the account executes four or more day trades (buy and sell the same security intraday) within a period of five business days. By default, this is set to `false`.

      The primary registered representative for the account

      The primary registered representative for the account

      The registration of the account (e.g. Individual, Joint, IRA, etc.)

      Indicates if the account is `OPEN`, `PENDING`, or `CLOSED`
